title: Experiment catalog
description: Curated catalog of pages + experiment-worthy actions, surfaced to non-technical PMs in the portal's 'Create with AI' picker. See specs/0017-adw-experiment-authoring.md. The dead-experiment guard (scripts/experiments.mjs) cross-checks every catalog entry against client/src.

version.description: Schema version. Bumping this is a breaking change for the portal.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Unique across pages.

title.description: Human-readable page title shown to PMs.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what users do on this page.

file.description: Internal file path (never shown to PMs). Used by the composer + drift guard.

surface.description: Maps to experiments[].surface. Used by the running-experiment overlap guard.

experimentable.description: When false, the page is hidden from the PM picker (still validated).

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Unique within the page.

description.description: One sentence on the user action.

metric.description: The conversion event this action fires, or proposes to fire. Omit when an action has no measurable conversion (a future use; v1 expects every experimentable action to declare a metric).

key.description: snake_case metric identifier — passed to api.trackEvent('<key>').

fires_in.description: Internal file path where trackEvent fires (or should fire, for proposed metrics).

status.description: instrumented = literal exists in code; proposed = catalog declares the opportunity but code does not fire it yet (ADW wires it via TEMPLATE B).

handler_hint.description: One sentence telling ADW exactly where to insert the trackEvent (e.g. 'after api.createAssessment resolves, before uploadFiles()'). Load-bearing for safe AI wiring.
